explanation: The code defines a program that takes a single command-line argument representing the path of an assembly file. It opens this file for reading and creates a new file named 'hila.hack' for writing. The program reads each character from the input file and writes it to the output file until it reaches the end of the file. It also handles errors for incorrect arguments and file opening failures.
name: 2008-05-18_no-subject
subject: (No Subject)
summary: This project implements a simple assembler program that reads an assembly file and writes its contents to a new file with a .hack extension.
